Cloudy Stone of Veeshan [Dragons of Norrath GH Portal Item]  
 

Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Cloudy Stone of Veeshan [Dragons of Norrath GH Portal Item]
Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:100
Merchant Value:35 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:50
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Drewie - Age of Unity
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 11:57:46
Page Updated:Wed Nov 6th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 134pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Merchants | Quests | Comments ]
Lore:
When handed to Zeflmin Werlikanin, or a teleportation assistant in a guild hall, this will align the teleporter to send you to the Plane of Sky.

Reagent for Spells

Spell Name
Alter Plane Sky

Merchants


Vendor listing - Premium only

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Guild Hall
Quest Name
Focus the Crystal Geode (Guild Hall Portal)

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Brell's Rest
Dead Hills
Degmar, the Lost Castle
Doesn't Exist
Erudin
Guild Hall
Lceanium
Oceangreen Village
Shadeweaver's Tangle
The Guild Lobby
Ports you to the Plane of Sky.


Uploaded November 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Brell's Rest
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2021 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
rallem
25 posts
Getting the Cloudy Stone of Veeshan is extremely easy at Brell's Rest. As soon as you enter the zone, to your right is a merchant named Marie Fay. Next to her is the Gem Trader for Rk. II Trade-in gems, Holdegar Bairdun. It's an 85th level zone, but I have not yet met any mobs at that location and have gone in there with my 53rd level Ranger. Oh, by the way, Marie sells the stone. Sorry for the tangent. If you want to know how to enter Brell's rest, jump into the hole. The entrance to Brell's has dead bodies all around it. Walk into the hole in the wall.
▲ Page top
Plane of Sky
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2020 at 4:47 AM Rating: Decent
Arigilos
5 posts
If you're on a TLP server, get the cloudy stone of Veeshan from Sornita Eltern in Erudin..

To get to Plane of Sky give Relm M'Loch a cloudy potion of Veeshan. (Located by the PoK book in Plane of Tranquility)

To get to the Plane of Hate give Relm M'Loch a Fuligan Soulstone
▲ Page top
Resupply Agent
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2020 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
jazzman707
7 posts
If you need one in a pinch, just pop your vet AA merchant. Everyone gets it now, and it sells both Sky and Hate stones.
▲ Page top
NOT AVAILABLE in POK
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2019 at 1:15 AM Rating: Excellent
Vedarian
Guru
186 posts
NOT AVAILABLE in POK -- at least not from any of the wizard spell vendors I checked including Channeler Keatrem.

I noticed many of the other spell reagents were not infinite either, marked as --, so it may be there sometimes if someone sold it there. But it's not reliable.

Like others, I got it in Brell's Rest but that's not so easy to get to.

Edited, Jun 29th 2019 2:17am by Vedarian

Edited, Jun 29th 2019 2:20am by Vedarian
▲ Page top

Can buy this stone from Transportation Assistant I the Grand Guild Hall

▲ Page top
Plane of Sky Confirmed
QuoteReply
# May 28 2010 at 9:11 AM Rating: Decent
DarkVendetta
Guru
189 posts
Sold in Guild hall by Zeflmin Werlikanin for about 105pp at 328 CHA. Can be bought in Stacks of 100.

When Turned in does activate Teleporter and sets location to Plane of Sky.
Just did this, so it is confirmed.
____________________________
Hope you enjoy (This recipe is a trademark by Nightmares Inc., all rights reserved.) :-D

Give the stone to Relm M'Loch in Plane of Tranquility and she will port you up.

WTF !
QuoteReply
# May 14 2005 at 2:27 PM Rating: Decent
korika
Scholar
380 posts
WTF is the probleme with search engine ?
i cannot find at all this "Cloudy Stone of Veeshan" thing
____________________________
Cookie, Antonius Bayles rangeress http://eqtoonx.free.fr/
▲ Page top
RE: WTF !
QuoteReply
# May 15 2005 at 11:32 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
Since this item has no stats, it is classified as a "minor" item, meaning it won't show up on searches unless you explicitly include minor items in the search.
▲ Page top
The new way to PoS?
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2004 at 1:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251744704
34 posts
I know there is now a way to get to POS w/o a port from a wizzy,,,the person is in PoT and will port you there if you have the stone on you...i'm looking for info on who this is and will post it when i find out NPC's name 8)

RE: The new way to PoS?

# Jan 17 2005 at 12:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1650845828563
29 posts
Well I guess the person was never found cause I don't see a follow up post. I will look into this matter myself. If I discover anything I will return with info. I do know that Relm M'Loch in PoT will port you to PoHate if you have the reagent need for the wizzy spell to get you there so I'm thinking there should be a NPC to do the same for PoS.

Merchant in PoK library downstairs on the left, Channeler Keatrem sells these for 104p 9g 9s 9c.

Location in Erudin
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2004 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1714954568099
Scholar
63 posts
Sold by Sornita Eltern (Wizard Spells) in Erudin Library, loc n1103, n229, p81 (3rd floor). You can use Find command to find her.

Used by Wizards to port to Plane of Sky.
▲ Page top

This stone is also sold in Gukta by Scribe Zibby at (563, -372) for 175 pp.

The Vendor's name in poknowledge is Channeler Keatrem. He is in the lower area of the Library with all the other Wizards.

Plane of Air port component
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2002 at 1:32 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361393910
45 posts
This component to let a wizard (and party) port to Plane of Sky has only been in the game since planes were invented. It was always on sale in the Erudin Library before PoP, now they just added a vendor in PoK.

edit: oops, said PoA in title, PoS in text. Whatever, its the only tier 1 plane that needs a component besides Plane of Hate.

Edited, Wed Nov 13 13:17:18 2002
